description: A project manager has sent a digital memo containing urgent audit logging constraints in `~/Desktop/audit_memo.png`. Transcribe these requirements into the SRS document in ReqView by creating a new section named 'Audit Logging' at the end of the document. Create three requirements matching the memo text exactly, including the specified 'Priority' attributes (High/Medium), and save the project.

requirements.text: The system shall encrypt all audit logs using AES-256.
Audit logs must be retained for a minimum of 5 years.
The system shall notify the administrator of any integrity violations.
